message:
tests: tui_state update for PiApp signature changes

Update all PiApp construction in tui_state tests for new signature:

Changes to build_app_* helpers:
- Import asupersync::sync::Mutex and SessionEntry
- Call conversation_from_session() before wrapping session in Arc<Mutex>
- Pass (messages, usage) tuple to PiApp::new() as final arguments
- Session now created as Arc::new(Mutex::new(session))

New local helper:
- conversation_from_session: mirrors the interactive.rs implementation
  for extracting ConversationMessage list and Usage from session entries

Affected test builders:
- build_app_with_session_and_config
- build_app_with_session_and_events_and_extension
- build_app_with_models
- build_app_with_session_and_events_and_config

This aligns tests with the PiApp constructor changes that now require
pre-computed conversation state to avoid holding session locks during
UI initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
